description:
Prayer Timer shows Islamic prayer times in your macOS menu bar with a live countdown to the next prayer.

• Daily schedule (Fajr/Imsak through Isha)
• Next-prayer countdown
• Manual city/country or optional automatic location
• Calculation method selection (via Aladhan API; Turkish Diyanet-aligned method available)
• Optional local notifications and reminders
• Optional widget sharing the same schedule

Internet is required to fetch prayer times. Location is used only when you enable automatic location; it is not sent to our servers.

Terms of Use (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
promotionalText: See daily prayer times and a precise countdown right from your Mac menu bar.
